implementation_rationale: Option A provides a good balance between accuracy, cost, and timeline. It uses a simple RAG with a vector database and a hosted LLM API, which can be implemented within the 6-week MVP timeline. Additionally, it respects user privacy and provides a good level of citation reliability.
risks: Limited accuracy due to the simplicity of the RAG model
Dependence on the hosted LLM API for question answering
Potential scalability issues with the vector database
mitigations: Continuously monitor and evaluate the performance of the RAG model and the hosted LLM API
Develop a plan to transition to a more advanced model or a custom LLM if needed
Design the vector database with scalability in mind and plan for potential upgrades
mvp_plan: Week 1-2: Design and implement the RAG model and the vector database
Week 3-4: Integrate the hosted LLM API and develop the question answering functionality
Week 5-6: Test and refine the system, and prepare for MVP launch
